description_long: This is a rectangular, vintage wooden chest of drawers with a slanted top surface and a weathered, rustic finish. The front face features six small drawers arranged in two rows, each with a round knob handle, and a single visible keyhole at the top center. The wood shows signs of age, including scratches, discoloration, and worn edges, giving it a well-used, antique appearance. The sides and back are plain, with the left side displaying a hand-painted number in white. The top surface is flat but marked with stains and scuffs, suggesting frequent use or storage. The overall construction appears sturdy, with thick wooden panels and a solid build, suitable for storing small items in an urban garage, workshop, or street-side setting.
description: A weathered, vintage wooden chest of drawers with six small drawers, round knob handles, and a slanted top, showing signs of age and use.
description_view_0: Front view showing six drawers with round knobs and a central keyhole, highlighting the chest's main interactive features.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain wooden panel with a hand-painted number in white, no drawers visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a flat, unadorned wooden back with visible wear and discoloration.
description_view_3: Right side view with a plain wooden panel, showing the depth and thickness of the chest.
